top_constraints.description: Out= Nil, avoid voltage collapse for loss of Horsham - Murra Warra - Kiamal 220kV line. Murraylink VFRB disabled. Swamp if Murraylink VFRB enabled.
Out = Bundey to Buronga (6F) 330kV line, avoid voltage collapse for loss of Horsham - Murra Warra - Kiamal 220kV line. Murraylink VFRB disabled. Swamp if Murraylink VFRB enabled.
Out= Nil, limit power flow on line X5 from Balranald to Darlington Point (X5) to avoid voltage collapse at Balranald for contingency trip of Bendigo to Shepparton 220kV line in NW Victoria
Out= Nil, avoid O/L Elaine to Moorabool 220kV line on trip of Ballarat to Moorabool No.2 220kV line, Feedback
Out= Murraylink, avoid voltage collapse for loss of Horsham - Murra Warra - Kiamal 220kV line

Out= Nil, limit power flow on line X5 from Balranald to Darlington Point (X5) to avoid voltage collapse at Balranald for contingency trip of Bendigo to Kerang 220kV line and other nearby lines in NW V
Out= Nil, avoid O/L Waubra to Ballarat 220kV line on trip of Kerang to Bendigo 220kV line, Feedback
Out = NIL, prevent transient instability for fault and trip of a HWTS-SMTS 500 kV line, Other than VIC accelerates. Yallourn W G1 on 500kV.
